title: Create Anarchy
description: Modpack for Create themed combat servers, with aerial mechanics, cannons, etc.
body:
# Create Anarchy
Anarchy lets you and your friends battle against each other with contraptions and vehicles you build and design yourself.

## Featuring
- Create for automation and mechanics
- Valkyrien Skies & Clockwork for airships
- Create: Big Cannons for...well, cannons
- Create: Armory for firearms
- Create: Deco for the wonderful block pallettes
- Create: Steam & Rails for the spectacular Create train overhaul
- Computercraft:Tweaked adding in computers programmable with Lua that can interface with Create contraptions and Valkyrien Skies ships via CC:VS
- Farmer's Delight for various food options
- Embeddium (Sodium) for enhanced performance
- Various other mods!

## Designed for Multiplayer
This modpack is designed with multiplayer specifically in mind. Including many different mods that enable the creation of complex war machines, you can play with friends and test out your machines against one another. You could create Attack Helicopters, Bomber Planes, Flying Aircraft Carriers, Tanks, ICBMs, you name it! I guess you could play it by yourself, obliterate a village or something.

## Disclaimers
- CC:VS now has a bugfix, but had to be added via overrides. 
  - Bugfix: [https://github.com/TechTastic/CC-VS/pull/7](https://github.com/TechTastic/CC-VS/pull/7)
  - Original mod: [https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-vs](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-vs)
- This pack contains a handful of mods that are in beta stages of development, so not everything will go as expected.
- This pack is a little resource intensive. Graphics struggle a bit more with large entities due to Valkyrien Skies & Clockwork adding in large ships, and also a little more CPU demanding because of Clockworks physics, but all should be well.
